local_overrides.reason: HealthcarePlatform remains a HIPAA zero-fail repo; governance package consumption may not weaken PHI controls, redaction expectations, or fail-closed PII/PHI routing.
HealthcarePlatform requires strict sandbox issue lanes with PR token, one issue per branch/worktree/PR, lane:subagents evidence, and lane:preflight before implementation.
Healthcare audit trail, RLS, tenant isolation, and reviewer gate controls remain authoritative local constraints.
Existing HealthcarePlatform reusable governance workflow refs are exact-SHA pinned and classified as local workflow caller surfaces; this metadata slice does not alter workflow behavior.
